case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY VS CHAVEZ, ERWIN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, ERWIN CHAVEZ, MARCELA AKA LOPEZ, MARCELA $2,720.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,720.00, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE #768688.
